Docstring: Initialize dictionary with default capacity
Code writing instructions: Set capacity to 16 and itemCount to 0; ReDim keys and values arrays to size 0 To capacity-1
Testing Considerations: test_Add: Size=0 initially; test_Size: Size=0 on new dict

Docstring: Add or update key-value pair
Arguments: key As String; value As Variant
Code writing instructions: Call FindIndex to check if key exists. If index>=0: update existing value using IsObject check for Set vs direct assignment. If new: check if itemCount>=capacity and call ExpandCapacity if needed; assign key to keys(itemCount) and value to values(itemCount) with IsObject check; increment itemCount
Testing Considerations: test_Add: Add first item (Size=1; Item retrieves value); add second item (Size=2); add numeric value (Item=123). test_UpdateValue: Add updates existing key; Size remains 1; can update string to numeric. test_ObjectValues: Add Range/Worksheet objects; retrieve via Item. test_ExpandCapacity: Add 20 items forces expansion beyond capacity 16

Docstring: Remove key-value pair by key
Code writing instructions: Call FindIndex to get index. If index>=0: loop from index to itemCount-2 shifting keys and values left (keys(i)=keys(i+1)) with IsObject check for values; decrement itemCount
Testing Considerations: test_Remove: Remove middle item (key2); Size=2; key2 not Exists; key1 and key3 still Exist. Remove first item (key1); Size=1. Remove last item (key3); Size=0. test_Size: Size decrements after Remove

Docstring: Get value by key
Code writing instructions: Call FindIndex to get index. If index>=0: return values(index) using IsObject check for Set vs direct return. Else: return Empty
Testing Considerations: test_Item: Retrieve string values ("John" "Boston"); numeric value (30); non-existent key returns Empty. test_ObjectValues: Retrieve Range.Address; Worksheet.Name. test_NestedHelperAccess: Access Item from nested helper function with tst argument

Docstring: Check if key exists
Code writing instructions: Return result of (FindIndex(key) >= 0)
Testing Considerations: test_Exists: Non-existent key returns False; after Add returns True; multiple keys all return True; previously added key still True after adding another. test_Remove: After Remove; removed key returns False; remaining keys return True. test_ExpandCapacity: Keys exist after capacity expansion

Docstring: Get number of items
Code writing instructions: Return itemCount
Testing Considerations: test_Size: Size=0 initially; Size=1 after first Add; Size=3 after three Adds; Size=2 after Remove; Size=0 after Clear. test_Add: Check Size after each Add. test_Remove: Check Size decrements. test_UpdateValue: Size=1 remains after updating existing key

Docstring: Get all keys as array
Code writing instructions: If itemCount=0 return empty array. Else: ReDim result(0 To itemCount-1); loop i from 0 to itemCount-1 setting result(i)=keys(i); return result
Testing Considerations: test_GetKeys: UBound(keys)=2 for 3 items; keys(0)="key1"; keys(1)="key2"; keys(2)="key3" in correct order. test_NestedHelperAccess: Call GetKeys from nested helper; verify UBound=3; verify all 4 keys correct

Docstring: Clear all items
Code writing instructions: Set itemCount=0 and capacity=16; ReDim keys and values arrays to 0 To capacity-1
Testing Considerations: test_Clear: After adding 3 items; Clear sets Size=0; all previously added keys return Exists=False; can Add new item after Clear (Size=1; Item retrieves new value). test_Size: Size=0 after Clear

Docstring: Find index of key (returns -1 if not found)
Code writing instructions: Private function. Loop i from 0 to itemCount-1. If keys(i)=key return i and exit. If not found return -1
Testing Considerations: Not directly tested (private); indirectly tested via all Add/Item/Exists/Remove operations

Docstring: Expand capacity when needed
Code writing instructions: Private sub. Set capacity=capacity*2; ReDim Preserve keys and values arrays to 0 To capacity-1
Testing Considerations: test_ExpandCapacity: Add 20 items (>16 initial capacity); Size=20; all items accessible (key1="value1"; key10="value10"; key20="value20"); all keys Exist (key1; key16; key17; key20)

Docstring: Parse JSON-like string and add key value pairs to Dictionary
Code writing instructions: Validate input string and call methods in sequence; ValidateAndStripBraces then SplitIntoPairs then ParsePair then AddParsedValue; return True on success and False on validation or parse failure
Testing Considerations: test_ParseStringToDictProcedure integration test; verify mixed types and whitespace tolerance; verify existing keys preserved except overwritten keys; verify malformed input returns False

Docstring: Validate outer braces and return inner string
Arguments: jsonStr As String; innerStr As String ByRef; Returns Boolean
Code writing instructions: Trim input; validate first char is { and last char is }; set innerStr using Mid without braces; fail on short or malformed input
Testing Considerations: Unit tests for valid braces and invalid braces; test empty string and short input; test trimmed input with spaces

Docstring: Split inner string into key:value pair tokens while respecting quoted strings
Arguments: innerStr As String; pairs As Variant ByRef; Returns Boolean
Code writing instructions: Loop characters with inQuotes flag; split on comma only when Not inQuotes; append final token; allow empty inner string for {} case
Testing Considerations: Unit tests for one pair and many pairs; test comma inside quoted string; test {} produces zero pairs

Docstring: Parse one key:value token into key and typed value
Arguments: pairStr As String; key As String ByRef; valParsed As Variant ByRef; Returns Boolean
Code writing instructions: Find first colon; split key and value parts; trim key and remove optional surrounding quotes; call DetectValueType for value parsing; fail when colon missing
Testing Considerations: Unit tests for quoted and unquoted keys; test missing colon returns False; test value parsing delegated correctly

Docstring: Detect String Boolean Double or Empty from value text
Arguments: valueStr As String; valParsed As Variant ByRef; Returns Boolean
Code writing instructions: Trim value text; quoted text maps to String; True or False maps to Boolean case insensitive; numeric maps to Double; empty maps to Empty; otherwise fail
Testing Considerations: Unit tests for quoted string; Boolean in mixed case; integer and decimal numbers; empty value; invalid unquoted text returns False

Docstring: Add parsed key and value to Dictionary using Add method
Arguments: key As String; valParsed As Variant; Returns Boolean
Code writing instructions: Call Add on current Dictionary instance; rely on Add behavior for new keys and updates; surface failure through Boolean return
Testing Considerations: Unit tests for add new key and overwrite existing key; verify object and scalar values are handled

Docstring: Initialize error handling state and workbook context
Arguments: wkbkE As Workbook Optional; IsHandle As Boolean Optional
Code writing instructions: Set defaults for IsHandle; code fields; ErrMsg; IsUserFacing; IsNewErr; IsShowMsgs; set wkbkE to ThisWorkbook unless argument is provided
Testing Considerations: test_Init sets defaults correctly; test wkbkE override path; test IsHandle toggle behavior

Docstring: Record root or nested error and trigger reporting gate
Arguments: Locn As String; CallingFunction As Boolean ByRef Optional
Code writing instructions: Detect driver call with IsMissing; set CallingFunction False for Boolean caller; set Locn; for root path resolve base plus local code then load and validate ErrorMeta and append user or developer message; for nested path append Called by only when non user-facing; report only when IsShowMsgs And IsDriverCall Or IsTesting
Testing Considerations: driver tests verify reporting gate; Boolean caller tests verify return False; root path tests verify developer and user-facing branches; nested tests verify Called by behavior only for non user-facing

Docstring: Compatibility wrapper for message append behavior
Code writing instructions: Prefer RecordErr for orchestration; when IsNewErr call shared root-message helper; when nested and non user-facing append suffix line and return True
Testing Considerations: smoke tests for compatibility behavior with root and nested paths

Docstring: Legacy preserved version of AppendErrMsg for comparison fallback
Code writing instructions: Keep behavior aligned with current implementation until removal decision; no new call sites added
Testing Considerations: smoke test can compare output shape against AppendErrMsg for representative cases before deprecation

Docstring: Lookup Errors_ metadata row by composite report code and return metadata array
Code writing instructions: Call SetTblELocations then rngMultiKeyBasic on code column; default to iErrNotFound row metadata when missing; return code; routine; message; IsUserFacing entries
Testing Considerations: tests for found row mapping; missing row fallback to Msg Not Found; base error marker behavior consumed by AppendErrMsg

Docstring: Accumulate and optionally show current ErrMsg
Code writing instructions: Exit when IsHandle False; call UpdateMsgsAccum; if IsShowMsgs then MsgBox with Execution Error title
Testing Considerations: tests verify Msgs_accum update always when handle enabled; MsgBox path gated by IsShowMsgs

Docstring: Lookup and report warning or information message by local code
Arguments: iCode As Integer; Locn As String; param Optional
Code writing instructions: Set Locn and iCodeLocal; call GetBaseErrCode and exit when missing; build message from aryErrLookup index 2 plus ErrParam and optional param; call UpdateMsgsAccum; gate MsgBox by IsShowMsgs; re-init errs at end
Testing Considerations: tests for warning message resolution and accumulation; missing base code exits quietly; re-init resets IsNewErr and fields

Docstring: Append message to accumulated warnings and errors text
Code writing instructions: Append msg and vbCrLf to Msgs_accum
Testing Considerations: tests for append order and line break behavior across multiple calls

Docstring: Lookup a comment message and add it to a range
Arguments: rng As Range; Locn As String; IsReinitialize As Boolean Optional
Code writing instructions: Set Locn; call GetBaseErrCode; if base code found add comment from aryErrLookup index 2; optionally re-init using wkbkE and IsHandle
Testing Considerations: tests for comment added on valid code; no comment when base code missing; IsReinitialize False retains state

Docstring: Resolve base error code for current routine location
Code writing instructions: Locate sErrBase row using rngMultiKeyBasic against function and message columns; set iCodeBase to iErrNotFound default then overwrite when row found; return True only when found
Testing Considerations: tests for known Locn returning base code; unknown Locn returns False and iErrNotFound

Docstring: Set Errors_ lookup columns and data rows range
Arguments: colrngFunc ByRef; colrngMsg ByRef; colrngCode ByRef; colrngIMsg ByRef; rngRows ByRef
Code writing instructions: Use wkbkE.shtErrors columns 1;3;4;6 and last used code row to build rngRows from row 2 to last row
Testing Considerations: tests for correct column assignments; rngRows extent matches populated Errors_ table

Docstring: Set local error attributes when a Boolean failure condition is true
Arguments: IsError As Boolean; iCode As Integer; ErrParam Optional; Returns Boolean
Code writing instructions: Return False when IsError False; when true set IsFail True; set iCodeLocal and optional ErrParam for downstream RecordErr
Testing Considerations: unit tests for true and false branches; ErrParam set only when provided

Docstring: Lookup message and show MsgBox with configured title and text
Arguments: Locn As String; iCode As Integer; vbType As Integer; param Optional; Returns Long
Code writing instructions: Default to missing base code message and title; on lookup success set iCodeLocal and message; split title and text via setMsgTitleAndText; append optional param; convert vbCrLf concat markers; return MsgBox response
Testing Considerations: tests for title split logic; default fallback path; optional param append; return value passthrough

Docstring: Split pipe-delimited message into title and text
Arguments: sMsg As String ByRef; sTitle As String ByRef
Code writing instructions: Split on |; when only one segment set title empty and keep message; when two segments assign title first and text second
Testing Considerations: tests for one-part and two-part message strings

Docstring: Reset warnings and errors setting and delete prior output file
Arguments: wkbk As Workbook; sSelf As String; IsVal As Boolean Optional
Code writing instructions: Compute local path from setting; delete existing warnings file when present; initialize settings value with ParseNow and caller or Validation suffix
Testing Considerations: tests for file deletion path when file exists; settings reset format for normal and validation modes

Docstring: Format current timestamp into fixed-length token
Code writing instructions: Build YYYYMMDD_HHMM_SS string with zero padding and underscore separators
Testing Considerations: length test equals 16; format tests for separators and zero padding

Docstring: Write accumulated settings text to warnings and errors file and clear setting
Arguments: wkbk As Workbook; IsVal As Boolean Optional
Code writing instructions: Read sSettingErrs and local path setting; fallback to ThisWorkbook.Path when missing; choose suffix _Val or datetime token; call WriteFile then DeleteSetting
Testing Considerations: tests for suffix selection in val and non-val runs; output path fallback; setting deletion after write

Code writing instructions: Set IsFound False; Code to iErrNotFound; Routine empty; Message empty; IsUserFacing False; IsBaseMessage False
Testing Considerations: test defaults after new instance

Code writing instructions: Resolve report code using base plus local context; directly query Errors_ table columns Code Routine Message and iMsgDevUser; on not found set IsFound False and Message Msg Not Found then return True; on found map typed fields and set IsFound True; return False on worksheet or lookup failure

Use_Case: Typed error metadata for AppendErrMsg refactor
Docstring: Validate loaded metadata and normalize malformed-row behavior
Code writing instructions: If IsFound False return True; validate required typed fields and boolean parseability; on malformed set Message to Malformed Errors_ Row for Locn and set malformed flag or fallback state without changing external wording contract
Testing Considerations: tests for malformed row cases including blank message and non-boolean user-facing field

Use_Case: Typed error metadata for AppendErrMsg refactor
Docstring: Build concise user-facing message text
Code writing instructions: Start from Message; append errParam when non-empty; no stack trace prefix
Testing Considerations: tests for concise output and param append

Use_Case: Typed error metadata for AppendErrMsg refactor
Docstring: Build developer-facing message text preserving legacy wording and line breaks
Arguments: errCodeReport As Long; errParam As String; Returns String
Code writing instructions: Preserve existing Error code prefix and routine plus message lines; append errParam in legacy location; preserve vbCrLf behavior

Use_Case: Typed error metadata for AppendErrMsg refactor
Docstring: Expose typed fields Code; Routine; Message; IsUserFacing; IsFound; IsBaseMessage and IsMalformed for integration
Code writing instructions: Use direct class attributes instead of Property Get and Let; keep values synchronized during LoadFromLookup and Validate without retaining raw lookup arrays
Testing Considerations: tests for default initialization and value updates across load and validate flows

Code writing instructions: Pre-initialize errs with SetupErrorsFixture; set iCodeLocal for developer row; call RecordErr with Boolean ByRef caller flag
Testing Considerations: assert caller flag False and developer message prefix present

Testing Considerations: assert developer format includes code and routine and detail; assert user-facing output is concise

Docstring: Verify nested Called by append behavior in RecordErr
Code writing instructions: Create root developer message then call RecordErr again with caller routine; verify Called by appended only for non user-facing path and suppressed for user-facing path
Testing Considerations: assert nested trace present for developer and absent for user-facing
